case_title: KUN MING LAU VS. JIMMY LIANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, KUN MING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, JIMMY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
